授業目的: 英文欄参照/Refer to the following:
到達目標: 英文欄参照/Refer to the following:
授業方法: Students will engage in discussions with partners and small groups, make presentations, listen and analyze, and use English for communicative tasks. Class structure has two lessons, A & B.Class A: Fluency Drills, Vocab & Lecture Tasks, Quiz.Class B: Fluency Drills, Discussion Tasks, Small Public Speaking Task.

トピック.授業外学習2:
Students will be expected to complete homework assignments including required listening and speaking activities.

Students must have regular access to computers and the internet either at home or through an on-campus computer lab.

参考文献・資料/Reference books0:
Some course materials will be provided by the teacher.
.
Also, students will need a Google account (Gmail) and regular access to the Internet to access Google Classroom.

Dictionaries (electronic, smartphone, or paper) highly recommended.
学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。
各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。

備考Note0:
この授業を履修するには、事前にレベル認定の申請が必要です。詳細は下記URL（kwicのキャビネット）の「履修手続」を確認してください。

If students are late to class, they are considered tardy. If more than 30 minutes late, they are considered absent. Two instances of tardiness are counted as one absence. One point per tardiness and two points per absence is taken off the final grade. A combination of 4 absences / 8 tardiness will result in a failing grade and the students expulsion from the class.
